content:
✨ eidos | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide a local-first, extensible, and AI-enhanced personal data management system that functions like a pocket database.
✨ Key Features: • Personal Data Management with Notion-like documents and databases • Offline Support with local data storage • AI Features for translation, summarization, and data interaction • Extensible framework with a simple extension system • Open SQLite data format
📖 Summary: Eidos is an extensible framework for personal data management, transforming SQLite into a user-friendly pocket database. It offers Notion-like document and database capabilities with strong offline support and integrated AI features for data interaction and extension generation.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
